references.role: global Licorn kitchen identity for all Seedance segments
references.prompt: Use only to preserve the Licorn kitchen island surfaces, lighting, material identity and continuity. Do not force wide framing when a macro detail is specified.

references.role: overhead island angle for sauce pour, tortilla assembly, pan assembly and toppings
references.prompt: Use only for overhead food actions on the island: tortilla assembly, baking dish rows, sauce pour and toppings.

references.role: wide vertical hero context for final Licorn kitchen shot
references.prompt: Use only for the final 9:16 kitchen hero where the character is visible and food remains foreground.

references.role: induction close-up for red sauce and filling pan details
references.prompt: Use for close saucepan and saute pan shots. Preserve induction surface; do not add flames.

references.role: brief induction setup context for filling
references.prompt: Use only to anchor the saute pan setup before macro filling details.

references.role: already-open oven context for pan insertion
references.prompt: Use for oven insertion with the door already open. Avoid door manipulation and extra actions.

references.role: baked bubbling close-up angle
references.prompt: Use for baked sauce bubbles, melted cheese blisters and crisp tortilla edges inside or near the oven.

references.role: Licorn character identity and visible hands continuity
references.prompt: Use only to preserve character identity and hand continuity. The food remains the subject.

references.role: satisfied expression reference for final hero
references.prompt: Use only in the final hero to make the character visibly satisfied without blocking the food.

references.role: top-down hand pose for overhead sauce, rolling and topping actions
references.prompt: Use for overhead visible hands during tortilla rolling, pan assembly and topping gestures.

references.role: three-quarter right pose for saute pan hand actions
references.prompt: Use for the filling pan segment where hands support spatula folding at the pan edge.

references.role: three-quarter left pose for serving lift
references.prompt: Use for the serving segment where hands guide the spatula and lift one enchilada.

references.role: front-facing character pose for final hero
references.prompt: Use for the final hero only; character should remain behind or beside the foreground food.

references.role: small saucepan shape for homemade red enchilada sauce
references.prompt: Use only as the sauce vessel during roux, stock whisking, simmer and spoon ribbon shots.

references.role: whisk shape for chili roux and stock incorporation
references.prompt: Use for continuous whisk contact with the sauce; prevent floating whisk or disconnected motion.

references.role: spoon for sauce spreading, filling placement and viscosity check
references.prompt: Use for sauce spreading on tortilla, filling placement and spoon-coating sauce ribbon.

references.role: folding and serving utensil
references.prompt: Use as folding utensil for filling and serving utensil for one enchilada lift.

references.role: rectangular 9 x 13-style baking dish shape
references.prompt: Use to preserve the rectangular dish footprint for eight parallel enchilada rolls.

references.role: target homemade red enchilada sauce color and viscosity
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate a macro reference of homemade red enchilada sauce in a small saucepan: deep red-brown chile color, glossy spoon-coating viscosity, smooth surface with a few slow bubbles, no tomato chunks, no garnish, no text.

references.role: target cooked chicken, green chile and black bean filling state
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate a close food-state reference of enchilada filling in a saute pan: small opaque chicken cubes, green chile flecks, translucent onion, whole glossy black beans, light steam, not saucy, not mashed.

references.role: single flour tortilla filled state before rolling
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate an overhead reference of one large flour tortilla spread with a smooth red sauce oval, chunky chicken-black bean filling arranged in a centered line, shredded Mexican cheese on top, clean edges, ready to roll.

references.role: pre-sauce pan topology with eight parallel rolled enchiladas
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate an overhead reference of a rectangular baking dish with eight neat parallel flour tortilla enchilada rolls seam-side down, pale tortillas visible, no sauce on top yet, clean row geometry.

references.role: pre-bake pan state after red sauce and shredded cheese
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate an overhead reference of the same rectangular pan of rolled enchiladas covered with glossy deep red enchilada sauce and scattered unmelted shredded Mexican cheese, roll ridges still subtly visible.

references.role: baked pan target state before fresh toppings
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate a close reference of baked chicken enchiladas in a rectangular dish: bubbling deep red sauce at edges, melted glossy cheese with small golden blisters, slightly crisp tortilla edges, visible steam, no fresh toppings yet.

references.role: finished topped enchilada pan state
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate a final pan reference of baked chicken enchiladas topped with cilantro leaves, avocado cubes, red onion pieces, white crema ribbon and cotija crumbles over melted cheese and red sauce, steam visible, appetizing but not overcrowded.

references.role: plated served enchilada with interior filling visible
references.prompt: Using gpt_image_2, generate a plated close reference of one served chicken enchilada opened gently with a fork: soft tortilla, red sauce glaze, melted cheese, visible chicken chunks, green chiles and whole black beans inside, fresh toppings nearby, steam rising.
